parameters.query:
INSERT INTO conversations (user_id, topic, session_id, role, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}', -- Mengambil ID user langsung dari data JSON di atas
  '{{ $json.topic }}',
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  'assistant',
  '{{ $json.conversation_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
);

INSERT INTO corrections (user_id, topic, session_id, wrong_text, correct_text, reason, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}', -- Mengambil ID user langsung dari data JSON di atas
  '{{ $json.topic }}',
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.correction.wrong.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.correction.right.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.correction.reason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
);

INSERT INTO sessions (user_id, topic, level, started_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.body.user_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.topic || 'Daily Life').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.level || 'A1').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, user_id, topic, level, started_at;

SELECT
  id,
  wrong_text,
  correct_text,
  reason,
  created_at
FROM corrections
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.params.session_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

SELECT role, message
FROM (
  SELECT role, message, created_at,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY created_at DESC) as rn
  FROM conversations
  WHERE session_id::text = '{{ $("Extract Transcription").first().json.session_id }}'
) sub
WHERE rn > 1
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO conversations (user_id, session_id, role, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}', -- Mengambil ID user langsung dari data JSON di atas
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  'assistant',           -- Karena ini pesan pembuka dari AI Tutor Anda
  '{{ $json.opening_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
);

INSERT INTO conversations (user_id, session_id, role, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}', -- Mengambil ID user langsung dari data JSON di atas
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  'user',
  '{{ $json.user_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
);
SELECT id, name, level, created_at, avatar_url FROM users WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO vocabularies (vocab_word, part_of_speech, level, definition)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.vocab_word.toLowerCase() }}',
  'NOUN',
  '{{ $json.level }}',
  'Ditambahkan otomatis saat mulai sesi'
)
ON CONFLICT (LOWER(vocab_word))
DO UPDATE SET level = EXCLUDED.level
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO user_vocabularies (user_id, session_id, vocabulary_id)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["Fetch Vocab"].json.user_id }}',
  --Mengambil paksa dari Node Code
  '{{ $node["Fetch Vocab"].json.session_id }}',
  --Mengambil paksa dari Node Code
  '{{ $json.id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id, session_id, vocabulary_id) DO NOTHING;

SELECT
  v.id,
  v.vocab_word,
  v.part_of_speech,
  v.level,
  v.definition
FROM public.user_vocabularies uv
INNER JOIN public.vocabularies v ON v.id = uv.vocabulary_id
WHERE uv.user_id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}'
  AND uv.is_mastered = false
ORDER BY uv.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH upsert AS (
    INSERT INTO vocabularies (vocab_word, part_of_speech, level)
    VALUES ($1, 'NOUN', $2)
    ON CONFLICT (LOWER(vocab_word)) DO NOTHING
    RETURNING id
)
SELECT id FROM upsert
UNION ALL
SELECT id FROM vocabularies WHERE LOWER(vocab_word) = LOWER($1)
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO user_vocabularies (user_id, session_id, vocabulary_id, is_mastered)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
ON CONFLICT (user_id, session_id, vocabulary_id)
DO UPDATE SET is_mastered = EXCLUDED.is_mastered, created_at = NOW();
